productDisplayName: Fila Men Flow Black Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Flow makes for a great casual shoe. Packed with features and crafted in a low profile silhouette, this shoe is a great buy.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations on the sides of the forefoot and has strategically placed overlays for absolute breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar with a textile lining for a custom fit and enhanced breathable comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticBella Italia print on the sides of the backfootMidsoleEVA midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs and herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
